messages.content: Write concise Python code only. Do not include markdown fences.
Define a Python function add_two(x) that returns x + 2.
Write concise Python code only. Do not include markdown fences.
Define a Python function evens(values) that returns a list of only even integers from values.
Write SQL only. Do not include markdown fences.
Write a SQL query selecting account_id and total_cents from invoices where status is 'open', ordered by total_cents descending.
